title: DraftCourtOrder
description: Output of the Judge Agent. A reasoned draft order produced by iterating through each framed issue in the AdversarialMatrix using the IRAC method (Issue, Rule, Application, Conclusion).

background_facts.description: A cohesive narrative synthesized from the undisputed_background array.

reasoned_decisions.description: One entry per framed_issue from the AdversarialMatrix. Judge iterates sequentially — one LLM call per issue_id.

issue_id.description: Must match an issue_id from the AdversarialMatrix.

rule.description: IRAC — Rule: the applicable law, statute, or precedent.

analysis.description: IRAC — Application: reasoning weighing petitioner vs respondent stances and citations.

conclusion.description: IRAC — Conclusion: specific ruling on this individual issue e.g. 'Issue decided in favour of Petitioner'.

final_order.description: Ultimate disposition of the case synthesized from all conclusions e.g. 'The petition is allowed / dismissed'.
